surface_quick_login_hint: Shiga cikin asusunka da sauri ta fuska mafi bayyana, tare da ƙarancin hayaniyar gani gwargwadon yiwuwa.

auth_password_validation_uppercase: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla babban harafi guda ɗaya
auth_password_validation_lowercase: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla ƙaramin harafi guda ɗaya

categorized_verses_msg:
@percentage% 
 na ayoyi an tsara su a cikin Sahifati naka
welcome_msg: Fara da ɗan gajeren tantancewar farko domin mu gina maka Sahifati mafi daidaito kuma mafi amfani tun daga rana ta farko.
welcome_kickoff_badge: Fara da jagora, ba allo na wucewa ba
welcome_kickoff_title: Mu fara da ɗan gajeren tantancewa da zai gina Sahifati naka a kan ainihin mataki
welcome_kickoff_subtitle: Wannan tantancewar ba gwaji na zahiri kawai ba ne. Mataki ne na tushe da ke taimaka wa Sahifati ya ba da shawarar wurin farawa mafi kusa da haƙiƙarka a haddacewa da fahimta.
welcome_kickoff_value_1_body: 'Yan mintoci kaɗan sun isa su ɗauki hoton farko kafin ka fara tafiyarka a cikin Sahifati.
welcome_kickoff_value_2_body: Sakamakonsa yana ƙayyade yadda za mu nuna maka ci gaba da shawarwarin farko ta hanyar da ta fi dacewa da matakinka.
welcome_kickoff_value_3_body: Za ka iya shiga Sahifati yanzu ka dawo daga baya, amma farkon zai fi daidaito idan ka fara da tantancewar da farko.
welcome_kickoff_step_1_body: Za mu shirya maka jerin tambayoyin gaggawa sannan mu kai ka kai tsaye zuwa tantancewar farko.
welcome_kickoff_step_2_body: Bayan ka amsa za ka ga Sahifati mafi kusa da halinka maimakon fara gaba ɗaya ko na bazata.
welcome_kickoff_step_3_title: 3. Ci gaba da abin da ya fi amfani gare ka
welcome_kickoff_step_3_body: Bayan haka za ka iya ci gaba da karatu ko ka dawo ga tantancewa masu zurfi daga baya daga cikin manhajar.
welcome_chart_subtitle: Muna nuna shi ne kawai idan akwai ainihin labarin bayanai, ba alamomin toka masu ruɗarwa ba.
welcome_chart_loading_title: Ana shirya taƙaitaccen bayani na farko
welcome_chart_loading_body: Muna duba bayananka na yanzu domin mu yanke hukunci ko akwai abin da ya dace a nuna yanzu ko a'a.
welcome_chart_empty_body: Bayan ka kammala tantancewar farko za mu nuna a nan taƙaitaccen sahihin cigabanka na farko maimakon kaso-kaso na ƙirƙira ko zane mai nuna wata nasara da ba ta wanzu ba.
welcome_chart_error_title: An kasa loda taƙaitaccen bayanin yanzu
welcome_chart_error_body: Za ka iya sake gwadawa ko ka fara tantancewar kai tsaye. Za mu gina taƙaitaccen bayanin idan bayanan sun samu.
welcome_chart_top_label: Sakamakon da ya fi bayyana a yanzu
welcome_chart_total_count: @count aya a cikin taƙaitaccen bayanin yanzu
welcome_dimension_hint: Za ka iya sauyawa tsakanin haddacewa da fahimta ne kawai idan akwai ainihin bayanai ga kowane fanni.
welcome_cta_body: Babbar shawara ita ce ka fara tantancewar farko yanzu domin Sahifati ya zama mafi amfani tun daga farko.
welcome_primary_cta_caption: Lokacin da ake tsammani: kusan minti 3. Za mu kai ka kai tsaye zuwa tambayoyin farawa.
welcome_secondary_cta_caption: Idan kana son duba farko, za ka iya shiga yanzu sannan ka dawo ga tantancewar daga baya cikin tafiyarka.
welcome_kickoff_error_missing_user: Ba za a iya fara wannan matakin ba kafin a dawo da session yadda ya kamata.
welcome_kickoff_generic_error: An kasa shirya wannan matakin yanzu. Ka sake gwadawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
generic_error: Wani kuskure ya faru. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
no_verses_found_to_evaluate: Ba a sami ayoyin da za a tantance ba
no_verses_to_display: Babu ayoyin da za a nuna

no_surahs_to_display: Babu surorin da za a nuna
no_verses_for_surah_in_juz: Babu ayoyi ga wannan surar a cikin wannan juzu'i
error_loading_surahs: Kuskure ya faru yayin loda surori: @error
delete_account_confirm_message: Kana da tabbacin kana son goge asusunka har abada? Ba za a iya janye wannan matakin ba.
delete_account_error: Kuskure ya faru yayin goge asusu

settings_profile_location_source_error: An kasa loda tushen ƙasashe da birane na yanzu. Ka sake buɗe allon.
settings_profile_section_subtitle: Gyara bayananka na sirri ka ajiye su kai tsaye a cikin bayanan martabarka.
settings_profile_country_code_helper: Ana samo ta kai tsaye daga Phone Code na ƙasar da aka zaɓa a wannan tushen gida ɗaya
settings_profile_country_code_auto: Ana ƙayyade ta kai tsaye daga ƙasar da aka zaɓa
settings_profile_city_helper_pick_countr: Zaɓi ƙasa da farko domin ganin biranen da ake da su
settings_profile_city_helper_canonical: A wannan hanya, city ne canonical field maimakon state
settings_profile_canonical_note: Ƙimomin da ake adanawa a ciki suna ci gaba da kasancewa canonical don tallafa fassara daga baya: @education / @work
main_screen_resume_body: Mahallin ƙarshe da aka adana yana a cikin sura @surah ta hanyar @path. Za ka iya komawa kai tsaye zuwa wannan wurin karatu maimakon fara wa daga farko.
main_screen_chart_empty: Babu isasshen karatun tantancewa da za a nuna jadawali a nan yanzu, saboda haka wannan allo yana mayar da hankali ne kan shigar da kai ga karatu da farko.
main_screen_chart_intro_first: Kana nan don shiga karatu kai tsaye. Bayan ainihin tantancewa sun taru, jadawalai za su dawo a matsayin taimako, ba madadin karatu ba.
main_screen_hizb_loading_body: Muna loda surori a cikin kowane hizb kafin buɗe wannan hanya domin kada ka isa katin da ba shi da ingantacciyar mafari ta karatu.

questions_screen_empty_no_levels_title: Babu matakai da ake da su yanzu
questions_screen_empty_loading_body: Ana shirya na'urorin tantancewar farko yanzu.
questions_screen_empty_no_levels_body: Ka sake gwadawa yanzu ko ka dawo daga baya.
questions_screen_level_subtitle: Kimanta naúrar gaba ɗaya ko duba ayoyi idan kana buƙata.
questions_screen_status_loading_body: Ana shirya ayoyi da matsayin tantancewar yanzu.
questions_screen_empty_level_title: Wannan matakin bai ƙunshi na'urori ba tukuna
questions_screen_empty_level_body: Je zuwa mataki na gaba ko ka gama wannan zagaye yanzu.
questions_screen_footer_hint: Za ka iya duba taƙaitaccen bayanin kafin ka je bincike.
questions_screen_metric_completed_units: Na'urorin da aka kammala a wannan matakin
questions_completion_open_browse_error: An kasa buɗe bincike yanzu. Ka sake gwadawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
questions_completion_badge_skipped: Ka gama zagayen yanzu da wuri
questions_completion_heading_skipped: Wannan shi ne taƙaitaccen bayanin matsayin ka na yanzu. Za ka iya kammala saura daga baya.
questions_completion_heading_complete: An kammala tantancewar farko. Ga ɗan taƙaitaccen bayani kafin zuwa bincike.
questions_completion_metric_last_level: Mataki na ƙarshe da ka kai
questions_completion_meaning_body_skippe: Za a shirya shafin bincike bisa ga abin da aka tantance kawai.
questions_completion_meaning_body_comple: Shafin bincike zai dogara da wannan tantancewar da duk wani bayanin baya da kake da shi.

custom_hizb_loading_snackbar: Har yanzu muna shirya surorin wannan hizb. Ka sake gwadawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
custom_hizb_error_snackbar: An kasa shirya wannan hizb yanzu. Ka gwada sake buɗe shafin ahzab.

teacher_recommendation_badge_unknown_tea: Malami da ba a sani ba
notifications_empty: Babu sanarwa a yanzu. Lokacin bitar ayoyin da suka cika shekara idan ya yi za su bayyana a nan.
notifications_cta_launch_failed: An kasa buɗe mahaɗin da ke da alaƙa da wannan sanarwar yanzu.

service_users_register_push_token_failed: An kasa yi wa token na sanarwa rijista a uwar garken yanzu.
forgot_password_preview_request_error: An kasa aika mahaɗin sake saitawa yanzu. Ka sake gwadawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
forgot_password_preview_reset_error: An kasa kammala sake saitawa yanzu duk da cewa mahaɗin har yanzu yana da inganci. Ka sake gwadawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
forgot_password_validation_password_leng: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla haruffa takwas
forgot_password_validation_password_uppe: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla babban harafi guda ɗaya
forgot_password_validation_password_lowe: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla ƙaramin harafi guda ɗaya

forgot_password_validation_password_symb: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla alama guda ɗaya
forgot_password_validation_email_require: Shigar da imel da aka haɗa da asusunka
forgot_password_validation_password_mism: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba
forgot_password_request_card_title: Maido da damar shiga asusunka a natse
forgot_password_request_card_body: Shigar da imel ɗin asusun kuma za mu aika mahaɗin sake saitawa idan asusun ya cancanta. Ba za mu nuna saƙon nasara na ƙirƙira ba a waje da ainihin kwangilar da ke tare da uwar garke.
forgot_password_request_caption: Za mu bar saƙon a gama-gari domin shafin kada ya tona ko an yi rijistar imel ko a'a.
forgot_password_request_accepted_body: Idan wannan imel yana da alaƙa da asusun da za a iya sake saitawa, za ka sami saƙo mai ɗauke da ingantaccen mahaɗi na ɗan gajeren lokaci. Buɗe saƙon sannan ka kammala saitawar ta hanyar mahaɗin ɗaya.
forgot_password_reset_card_body: Yi amfani da kalmar sirri mai ƙarfi sannan ka koma shafin shiga. Idan mahaɗin ya ƙare ko an riga an yi amfani da shi, za mu mayar da kai kai tsaye zuwa neman sabon mahaɗi.
forgot_password_password_rules: Aƙalla haruffa takwas tare da babban harafi, ƙarami, lamba da alama.
forgot_password_reset_success_body: Yanzu za ka iya komawa shiga ka yi amfani da sabuwar kalmar sirrin kai tsaye. Duk tsofaffin sessions na refresh an soke su a ɓangaren uwar garke.
forgot_password_reset_expired_title: Mahaɗin ba shi da inganci kuma
forgot_password_reset_expired_body: Mai yiwuwa mahaɗin ya ƙare ko an riga an yi amfani da shi. Nemi sabon mahaɗi don ci gaba maimakon sake gwada fom ɗin da ba zai yi nasara ba.
forgot_password_stage_subtitle_request: Wani ɓangare ne a sarari na tafiyar shiga kanta: nema mahaɗi, buɗe imel, sannan ka koma asusu ba tare da saƙonnin ruɗarwa ba.
forgot_password_stage_subtitle_request_a: Mataki na gaba yanzu yana cikin imel. Da zarar an buɗe mahaɗin za mu mayar da kai kai tsaye zuwa sabunta kalmar sirri.
forgot_password_stage_subtitle_reset: Yanzu kana a muhimmiyar mataki: canja kalmar sirri sannan ka koma allon shiga da sabuwar kalmar sirri.
forgot_password_stage_subtitle_reset_suc: Tafiyar ta kammala. Abin da ya rage shi ne ka sake shiga da sabuwar kalmar sirri.
forgot_password_stage_subtitle_reset_exp: Ba ma ƙoƙarin ɓoye matsalar a nan: wannan mahaɗin ba ya da inganci kuma dole a maye gurbinsa da sabuwar buƙata.
email_verification_pending_resend_succes: An aika sabon mahaɗi zuwa imel ɗinka.
email_verification_pending_resend_missin: Babu imel da aka adana don sake aika mahaɗin tabbatarwa.
email_verification_pending_already_verif: An riga an tabbatar da wannan asusun.
email_verification_pending_title: Ana jiran tabbatar da imel ɗinka
email_verification_pending_subtitle: Mun dakatar da ƙirƙirar session har sai an kammala tabbatar da asusun cikin aminci.
email_verification_pending_step_2_subtit: Mahaɗin zai kai ka zuwa shafin nasara ko gazawa a sarari a cikin manhajar.
email_verification_pending_step_3_subtit: Ba za mu shigar da kai zuwa allo na maraba ko onboarding ba kafin a kammala tabbatarwa.
email_verification_pending_resend_wait: Za ka iya sake aikawa bayan daƙiƙa @seconds
email_verification_pending_change_email: Gyara imel ko ƙirƙiri sabon asusu
email_verification_result_loading_body: Za mu mayar da kai kai tsaye zuwa yanayin nasara ko gazawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
email_verification_result_success_title: An tabbatar da asusun cikin nasara
email_verification_result_success_body: Asusunka yanzu a shirye yake. Mun ƙirƙiri session ne kawai bayan an kammala tabbatarwa domin tafiyar rajista ta kasance mai tsari kuma mai aminci.
email_verification_result_expired_body: Wannan mahaɗin tabbatarwar ba ya da inganci kuma. Za ka iya neman sabon mahaɗi daga allon jira kuma ka ci gaba daga can.
email_verification_result_failed_body: Ba mu iya amincewa da wannan mahaɗin ba. Mai yiwuwa ba daidai ba ne ko an riga an yi amfani da shi ko yana buƙatar sake fitarwa.
content_item_card_recommendation_delete_: An kasa goge shawarar a yanzu.
content_item_card_support_ayah_range: Kimanta sashen gaba ɗaya ko buɗe ayoyi ɗaya-ɗaya.
content_item_card_support_juz: Kimanta juzu'i gaba ɗaya ko buɗe surori da ayoyi.
content_item_card_support_default: Kimanta naúrar gaba ɗaya ko buɗe ayoyi ɗaya-ɗaya.
content_item_card_action_rate_unit_subti: Za a aiwatar da sakamakon ga duk ayoyi.
content_item_card_action_review_verses_s: Domin ƙarin daidaito ko bayanin ɗaya-ɗaya.
content_item_card_juz_hint: Za ka iya danna katin da kansa don buɗe surori a cikin juzu'in.
assessment_dialog_title_unavailable: Babu zaɓuɓɓukan tantancewa da ake da su
assessment_dialog_no_values: Babu ƙimomin tantancewa da suka shirya a mahallin yanzu. Ba za ka iya ajiye sabuwar tantancewa daga wannan taga yanzu ba.
assessment_dialog_memorization_unavailab: Zaɓuɓɓukan haddacewa ba su samuwa a taxonomy na yanzu, saboda haka wannan tantancewar za ta tsaya ga fahimta kawai.
assessment_dialog_comprehension_unavaila: Zaɓuɓɓukan fahimta ba su samuwa a taxonomy na yanzu, saboda haka wannan tantancewar za ta tsaya ga haddacewa kawai.
assessment_dialog_subjects_label: Batutuwan da ke da alaƙa da ayar
assessment_dialog_subjects_unavailable: An kasa loda sunayen batutuwan a yanzu.
assessment_dialog_hint: Danna ƙimar ɗaya sau na biyu don cire ta. Ba za a ajiye wani canji ba har sai ka zaɓi ajiye.
pending_sync_title: Tantancewar da aka ajiye suna jiran daidaitawa
pending_sync_body_single: Akwai tantancewa guda ɗaya da aka ajiye a wannan na'urar kuma za a aika ta kai tsaye idan haɗi ya dawo.
pending_sync_body_plural: Akwai tantancewa @count da aka ajiye a wannan na'urar kuma za a aika su kai tsaye idan haɗi ya dawo.
quran_reading_display_preferences_save_e: An kasa ajiye zaɓin nuni a yanzu.
quran_reading_assessment_unavailable_not: Tantancewa ba ta samuwa yanzu, amma za ka iya ci gaba da karatu ka sake gwadawa daga baya.
quran_reading_connection_notice: Karatu har yanzu yana samuwa, amma tantancewa da shawarwari suna buƙatar haɗi mai aiki.
quran_reading_assessment_options_error: An kasa shirya zaɓuɓɓukan tantancewa yanzu. Za ka iya ci gaba da karatu ka sake gwadawa daga baya.
quran_reading_previous_assessments_error: An kasa loda tantancewarka na baya a yanzu. Za ka iya ci gaba da karatu ka ƙara sabuwar tantancewa idan ya zama dole.
quran_reading_teacher_recommendations_er: An kasa loda shawarwarin malami a yanzu, saboda haka karatu zai ci gaba da kasancewa ba tare da wannan shimfiɗar na ɗan lokaci ba.
quran_reading_page_picker_invalid: Lambar shafi dole ta kasance tsakanin 1 da 604.
quran_reading_filter_subtitle: Ayoyin da ba su dace ba za su ci gaba da bayyana da launi mai dusashewa maimakon ɓoyewa.
quran_reading_filter_empty_dimension: Babu zaɓuɓɓukan da ake da su ga wannan fanni a cikin wannan iyaka.
quran_reading_filter_active_summary: An kunna fanni @count a tacewar yanzu.
feedback: Aika ra'ayi da bayanai ta shafin
privacy_policy_intro: Barka da zuwa "Sahifati". Muna ba wa sirrin bayananku da tsaron bayanan ku na sirri muhimmanci sosai. Wannan manufa tana bayyana yadda muke tattarawa, amfani da kare bayanan da kuke bayarwa lokacin amfani da gidan yanar gizonmu da manhajarmu ta wayar hannu.
privacy_policy_section_1_a_title: A. Bayanai na asusu da bayanan martaba
privacy_policy_section_1_a_content:
Lokacin da ka yi rajista a "Sahifati", muna tattara bayanai masu zuwa domin keɓance ƙwarewarka da inganta injin shawarwarinmu:
• Bayanai na shaidar shiga: sunan mai amfani, kalmar sirri da aka ɓoye, ko bayanan shiga ta (Google/iPhone/Facebook).
• Bayanai na sirri: suna, jinsi, shekarar haihuwa.
• Bayanai na yanki: ƙasa da jiha/lardi.
• Bayanai na ilimi: matakin ilimi da irin ƙwarewa.
privacy_policy_section_1_b_title: B. Bayanai na amfani da tantancewa
privacy_policy_section_1_b_content:
• Tarihin haddacewa: ayoyin da ka tantance (ka iya, na bita, da sauransu).
• Sha'awar abun ciki: batutuwan da kake mu'amala da su domin ciyar da injin shawarwari.
privacy_policy_section_1_c_title: C. Bayanai na lasisi da ma'amaloli
privacy_policy_section_1_c_content:
• Saye-saye: tarihin sayen lasisi (ba tare da adana bayanan katin kuɗi kai tsaye ba, domin ana yin hakan ta masu ba da sabis na biyan kuɗi masu amana).
• Lambobin kunnawa: tarihin lambobin da aka ƙirƙira (Promo Codes) ko aka karɓa ta tsarin "kyauta".
privacy_policy_section_2_content:
Muna amfani da bayanan da muke tattarawa don waɗannan manufofi:
1. Kunna sabis: tabbatar da lasisin amfani da ingancin asusu.
2. Injin shawarwari: ba da shawarwarin haddacewa da aka keɓance bisa matakin iliminka, ƙwarewarka da kaso na iyawarka ga ayoyi.
3. Gudanar da abun ciki: ba da damar tsarin duba na matakai uku (mai gyara, mai kulawa, mai amincewa) domin tabbatar da daidaiton tsara batutuwan Alƙur'ani.
4. Tsarin kyauta: sarrafa rarraba lasisi kyauta da waɗanda aka mallaka.
5. Sadarwa: aika sanarwa game da matsayin shawarwarinka ko muhimman sabuntawar manhaja.
privacy_policy_section_3_content:
• Ba ma sayarwa ko hayar da bayanan ku na sirri ga ɓangarori na uku.
• Bayanai na jama'a: wasu bayanai (kamar sunan mai amfani da gudummawar da aka bayar a fihirisa) na iya bayyana ga masu kulawa da masu amincewa a matsayin ɓangare na tafiyar bita.
• Cibiyoyi: idan kana ƙarƙashin cibiya ko ƙungiya da ke amfani da "Ayyukan cibiyoyi", mai kula da cibiyar na iya ganin rahotannin ci gabanka a haddacewa.
privacy_policy_section_4_content:
Mun jajirce wajen kare bayananku ta hanyoyi masu zuwa:
• Ɓoye kalmomin sirri ta amfani da ingantattun ƙa'idodi (kamar PBKDF2).
• Amfani da hanyoyin sadarwa masu tsaro (HTTPS) wajen wucewar bayanai.
• Yin ajiyar bayanai akai-akai domin tabbatar da cewa bayanan haddacewa da tantancewarku ba su ɓace ba.
privacy_policy_section_5_content:
Kana da haƙƙin:
• Samun bayanan bayanan martabarka da gyara su a kowane lokaci.
• Neman a goge asusunka har abada.
• Zaɓar kada ka karɓi saƙonnin talla.
privacy_policy_section_6_content: Za mu iya sabunta wannan manufa lokaci-lokaci domin ta nuna canje-canje a manhajar ko dokoki masu alaƙa. Za a sanar da ku duk wani muhimmin canji ta imel ko ta sanarwa cikin manhajar.
privacy_policy_section_7_content: Idan kana da wata tambaya game da manufar sirri, da fatan za ka tuntube mu ta imel ɗin tallafin fasaha da ke cikin manhajar
continue_with_social: Ko ka ci gaba ta hanyar
social_auth_subtitle: Yi amfani da amintaccen asusu domin kammala shiga ko ƙirƙirar asusu cikin sauri.
social_google_requires_client_id: Kunna GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID domin Google ya yi aiki a yanar gizo.
social_google_requires_mobile_config: Ba a kunna Google a wannan na'urar ba har sai an ƙara GOOGLE_SERVER_CLIENT_ID kuma an kammala saitunan Android OAuth a Google Cloud don package da sa hannun rajista.
social_google_mobile_interrupted: An dakatar da shiga ta Google kafin a kammala a wannan na'urar. Idan ba kai ne ka soke aikin ba, duba saitunan Android OAuth a Google Cloud, musamman sunan package, sa hannun SHA-1 da SHA-256, da daidaitaccen Google client.
social_facebook_requires_app_id: Kunna FACEBOOK_APP_ID domin Facebook ya yi aiki a yanar gizo.
social_provider_temporarily_unavailable: @provider ba ya samuwa a yanzu a wannan na'urar.
social_account_exists_with_password: Akwai asusu da wannan imel. Ka fara shiga da kalmar sirri.
social_account_exists_with_different_pro: Wannan imel yana da alaƙa da wata hanyar shiga daban. Yi amfani da @provider don ci gaba.
social_account_already_linked: An riga an haɗa wannan asusun zamantakewar da wani asusun Sahifati daban.
social_missing_id_token: An kasa samun token ɗin da ake buƙata don kammala shiga ta zamantakewa.
social_cancelled: An soke shiga kafin a kammala ta.
social_auth_invalid_response: Amsar tabbatarwa ba ta cika ba.
social_google_sign_in_failed: An kasa kammala shiga ta Google yanzu.
social_facebook_sign_in_failed: An kasa kammala shiga ta Facebook yanzu.
social_google_card_subtitle: Yi amfani da amintaccen asusun Google don ci gaba da sauri.
social_facebook_card_subtitle: Ci gaba da asusun Facebook ɗinka na yanzu.
auth_account_not_verified: Da fatan za ka tabbatar da imel ɗinka kafin shiga.
auth_license_required: Ana buƙatar kunna lasisi mai aiki kafin ci gaba da amfani da wannan fasalin.
auth_login_use_social_auth: Wannan asusun yana amfani da shiga ta zamantakewa. Yi amfani da zaɓin shiga ta zamantakewa maimakon kalmar sirri.
auth_registration_verification_email_una: Rajista ba ya samuwa na ɗan lokaci saboda an kasa aika saƙon tabbatarwa. Ka sake gwadawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
auth_login_subtitle_compact: Fuska mai natsuwa da sauri da ke kai ka kai tsaye zuwa asusunka ba tare da cunkoson gani ba.
auth_account_selector_subtitle: Shiga da asusun da aka adana ko ka ci gaba da hannu.
auth_saved_accounts_caption: Session mai inganci yana buɗewa kai tsaye, in ba haka ba ana buƙatar kalmar sirri.
auth_saved_accounts_empty_title: Har yanzu babu asusun da aka adana
auth_saved_accounts_empty_body: Shiga da hannu ko ƙirƙiri sabon asusu.
auth_saved_accounts_incomplete_user_erro: Bayanan mai amfani ba su cika ba
auth_saved_accounts_session_expired: Session na wannan asusun ya ƙare, da fatan za a sake shiga.
auth_signup_subtitle_compact: Sabuwar fuska mai sauƙi kuma a sarari wadda ke haɗa ƙirƙirar asusu da ci gaba da sauri a wuri guda.
auth_methods_caption: Ƙananan gumaka don shiga kai tsaye
service_users_resend_verification_failed: An kasa sake aika mahaɗin tabbatarwa.
service_users_load_balance_failed: An kasa loda ma'aunin lasisi na yanzu.
service_users_load_promo_codes_failed: An kasa loda Promo Codes naka.
service_users_activate_license_failed: An kasa kunna lasisi daga ma'ajiyar kyauta.
service_users_activate_promo_failed: An kasa kunna lasisi ta Promo Code.
service_users_create_promo_failed: An kasa ƙirƙirar sabon Promo Code daga ma'ajiyarka.
service_users_purchase_intent_failed: An kasa shirya mahaɗin sayen lasisi a yanzu.
service_users_revoke_promo_failed: An kasa soke Promo Code na lasisi.
service_users_request_password_reset_fai: An kasa aika mahaɗin sake saita kalmar sirri.
service_users_complete_password_reset_fa: An kasa kammala sake saitin kalmar sirri.
service_users_missing_auth_token: Session na asusun ba shi da auth token. Da fatan za a sake shiga.
license_activation_title: Kunna asusunka don ka fara a cikin Sahifati
license_activation_body: Ka kammala shiga cikin nasara, amma ainihin amfani da manhajar yana buƙatar lasisi mai aiki. Yanzu za ka iya kunnawa daga ma'ajiyar kyauta, ko ta Promo Code, ko ka fara siyan lasisi ka buɗe shafin biyan kuɗi na waje sannan ka dawo ka tabbatar da kunnawar.
license_activation_status_pending: Matsayin lasisi na yanzu: ana jiran kunnawa
license_activation_gift_body: Idan akwai ma'aunin kyauta da ake da shi a dandali, za mu cire lasisi guda ɗaya mu haɗa shi da asusunka nan take cikin aminci.
license_activation_promo_body: Shigar da Promo Code da ya zo maka, kuma za mu yi ƙoƙarin kunna lasisin a asusunka kai tsaye idan yana da inganci kuma ya dace da ma'aunin da ake da shi.
license_activation_promo_missing_code: Shigar da Promo Code da farko kafin ci gaba.
license_activation_purchase_body: Waɗannan su ne farashin lasisi na yanzu. Za a ƙara siyan kan layi daga baya.
license_activation_purchase_launched: An buɗe shafin biyan kuɗi na waje. Bayan ka gama, koma cikin manhajar ka danna tabbatar da kunnawa.
license_activation_purchase_pending_afte: Har yanzu ba a sami tabbacin biyan kuɗi ba ko lasisin yana nan ana aiki da shi. Ka sake dubawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
license_activation_purchase_open_failed: An kasa buɗe shafin biyan kuɗi na waje.
license_activation_purchase_deferred_not: Zaɓi kunshin da ya dace da kai yanzu, kuma za mu ƙara saye a cikin manhajar daga baya.
license_activation_purchase_footer_note: Har sai saye ya samu, za ka iya kunnawa ta kyauta ko ta Promo Code idan yana akwai.
profile_qr_share_caption: Duba lambar domin aika buƙatar kulawa.
profile_qr_save_failed: An kasa ajiye hoton, ka sake gwadawa.
profile_qr_save_share_hint: Ajiye hoton daga menu na rabawa.
profile_qr_card_subtitle: Nuna ta ga malaminka domin ya ƙara ka kuma ya bi ci gabanka.
profile_supervisor_intro_body: Malaminka yana duba lambarka don ya aika buƙatar kulawa. Idan ka amince, zai iya ganin ci gabanka, kuma za ka iya kawo ƙarshen alaƙar a kowane lokaci.
profile_add_supervisor_sheet_body: Duba lambar malami da aika buƙatar kulawa za su samu a sabuntawa mai zuwa. A yanzu, za ka iya raba lambarka domin malamin ya ƙara ka daga ɓangarensa.
supervision_scan_hint: Mayar da kyamara zuwa lambar malami domin a fara dubawa, ko ka zaɓi hoton lamba daga gallery.
supervision_scan_no_code_in_image: Ba mu iya karanta ingantacciyar lamba a cikin hoton ba.
supervision_scan_code_not_found: Ba a yi rijistar wannan lambar a Sahifati ba.
supervision_scan_preview_failed: An kasa loda bayanan asusu, ka sake gwadawa.
supervision_scan_send_failed: An kasa aika buƙatar kulawa, ka sake gwadawa.
supervision_preview_body: Za ka aika wa wannan asusun buƙatar kulawa. Idan ya amince, zai iya bin ci gabanka a haddacewa da bita.
supervision_preview_warning_self: Ba za ka iya aika buƙatar kulawa zuwa asusunka ba.
supervision_preview_warning_active: Tuni kana da kulawa mai aiki tare da wannan asusun.
supervision_preview_warning_pending: Ka riga ka aika buƙatar kulawa zuwa wannan asusun kuma har yanzu ana jiran amsa.
supervision_scan_result_created_body: Asusun zai karɓi sanarwa game da buƙatarka. Za mu sanar da kai idan an amince da ita ko an ƙi.
supervision_scan_result_pending_body: Kana da buƙatar kulawa ta baya zuwa wannan asusun wadda har yanzu ba a amsa ba.
supervision_scan_result_active_body: Tuni akwai kulawa mai aiki a tsakaninku.
supervision_incoming_empty_body: Sabbin buƙatun kulawa za su bayyana a nan idan ɗalibi ya aika su.
supervision_limits_teachers_label: Malaman da ke kula da ni
supervision_requests_load_failed: An kasa loda buƙatu, ka sake gwadawa.
supervision_links_load_failed: An kasa loda jerin ɗalibai, ka sake gwadawa.
supervision_limits_load_failed: An kasa loda bayanan ƙididdiga, ka sake gwadawa.
supervision_one_time_review_failed: An kasa fara zaman bita na sau ɗaya.
supervision_one_time_review_started: An fara zaman bita na sau ɗaya.
supervision_reject_confirm_body: Dalibin ba zai iya aika sabuwar buƙata ba na sa'o'i 24. Kana son ci gaba?
supervision_one_time_review_confirm_body: Za ka buɗe zaman wucin gadi da ke ba ka damar duba bayanan ɗalibin sau ɗaya kawai ba tare da ƙirƙirar kulawa mai ɗorewa ba. Za ka iya rufe shi a kowane lokaci, kuma ba za ka sake buɗe shi ba bayan an rufe.
supervision_student_limit_reached: Dalibin ya kai iyakar masu kulawa (@current/@max) kuma ba zai iya ƙara ka yanzu ba.
supervision_teacher_no_links: Ba ka da kulawa mai aiki da za a cire.
supervision_pick_remove_body: Zaɓi ɗaya daga cikin ɗalibanka na yanzu ka cire kulawarka daga gare shi domin ka ba da wuri ga sabuwar buƙata.
license_hub_subtitle: Bi diddigin ma'aunin da ka mallaka da wanda aka kulle, ƙirƙiri Promo Code daga lasisin da kake da su, sannan ka soke lambobin da ba a yi amfani da su ba idan ya zama dole.
license_hub_status_active: An kunna asusunka a yanzu kuma za ka iya rarraba lambobi daga ma'ajiyarka da ka mallaka.
license_hub_status_pending: Har yanzu asusunka yana jiran kunnawa, amma wannan allo yana nuna matsayin ma'auni da lambobin da aka adana a session ɗinka na yanzu.
license_hub_owned_count: Ma'aunin mallaka da ake da shi
license_hub_reserved_count: Ma'aunin da aka kulle domin lambobi
license_hub_create_body: Kowane amfani da aka kebe a cikin Promo Code yana cire lasisi daga ma'aunin mallaka zuwa ma'aunin da aka kulle. Idan ka soke lambar, amfanin da ba a cinye ba zai koma ma'ajiyarka.
license_hub_max_uses_invalid: Shigar da cikakkiyar lamba da ta fi sifili.
license_hub_max_uses_exceeds: Adadin da ka nema ya wuce ma'aunin mallaka da ake da shi (@max).
license_hub_max_uses_zero: Ma'aunin mallakarka sifili ne, sayi sabbin lasisi don ƙirƙirar lambobi.
license_hub_create_success: An ƙirƙiri sabon Promo Code ta hanyar kebe @count daga ma'ajiyarka.
license_hub_recent_code_title: Promo Code da aka ƙirƙira yanzu
license_hub_share_message: Wannan Promo Code ne don kunna Sahifati: @code
license_hub_legacy_code_hidden: Tsohuwar lamba ce da ba za a iya dawo da ita ba. Za ka iya soke ta ka dawo da ma'aunin.
license_hub_gift_pool_balance: Ma'aunin kyauta da ake da shi
license_hub_gift_pool_consumed_label: Jimillar abin da aka cinye daga kyauta
license_hub_gift_pool_irreversible: Gargaɗi: mayar da lasisi zuwa ma'ajiyar kyauta aiki ne na ƙarshe kuma ba za a iya janye shi ba.
license_hub_gift_pool_confirm_title: Tabbatar da canja wuri zuwa kyauta
license_hub_gift_pool_confirm_body: Za a canja lasisi @count daga ma'aunin da ka mallaka zuwa ma'ajiyar kyauta har abada. Kana son ci gaba?
license_hub_no_codes: Har yanzu babu Promo Codes da aka adana a wannan asusun.
license_hub_revoke_confirm_body: Soke @code zai mayar da amfanin da ba a cinye ba zuwa ma'ajiyarka. Kana son ci gaba?
license_hub_revoke_success: An soke Promo Code kuma an mayar da @count na amfanin da ba a cinye ba zuwa ma'ajiyarka.
service_ayat_load_range_failed: An kasa loda kewayon ayoyin da aka zaɓa.
service_surahs_load_failed: An kasa loda surorin wannan juzu'i.
service_api_unauthorized: Session ya ƙare. Da fatan za a sake shiga.
service_api_forbidden: Ba ka da izinin aiwatar da wannan aiki.
service_api_not_found: Ba a sami abin da aka nema ba.
service_api_validation_error: Bayanan da aka aika ba su da inganci.
service_api_server_error: An samu kuskure a uwar garke. Ka sake gwadawa daga baya.
service_api_unavailable: Sabis ɗin ba ya samuwa na ɗan lokaci. Ka sake gwadawa daga baya.
service_api_unexpected_status: Uwar garken ta mayar da amsa marar tsammani (@statusCode).
service_api_unsupported_http_method: Hanyar HTTP ba ta da tallafi: @method
service_api_unauthorized_prefix: Ba a ba da izini ba:
service_api_invalid_input_prefix: Shigarwar da ba ta da inganci:
auth_owner_brand_caption: Mallakinta kuma ana tafiyar da ita ne ta
